texto: 'Venti caramel macchiato, please,' he said. 'Hold the snobbery.' The barista laughed and hit buttons on his register. 'You sure? We're having a sale on social mobility. The longer your coffee order takes to place, the more you have to pay.' 'Perfect. Reverse consumerism.'
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de S.W. Vaughn que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “'Venti caramel macchiato, please,' he said. 'Hold the snobbery.' The barista laughed and hit butt…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, coffee, snobs, com foco em snobs e witty.
